headline: BlackRock Won’t Let Billionaires Cash Out of Its $26B Fund. That Should Worry Everyone.
summary: BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) is blocking investors from fully exiting its $26 billion HPS Corporate Lending Fund after redemption requests hit 9.3% of shares in Q1, well above the fund’s 5% quarterly cap. It marks the first time withdrawal requests have exceeded that limit, and the market is reacting accordingly. BLK shares are down 7.17% following the ... BlackRock Won’t Let Billionaires Cash Out of Its $26B Fund. That Should Worry Everyone.
